---
name: example-skill
description: Demonstrates a typical skill layout — instructions for Claude Code paired with a worked example.
---

# example-skill

This skill shows how the dashboard renders a `SKILL.md` file under the
configured `skills_path`. The Skills pane lists every directory containing
a `SKILL.md`, with the file shown as an `[INDEX]` badge in the section
header.

## Usage

Invoke this skill when you want a quick reference for dashboard fixture
layout.
